name: delete_debug_port
full_help:
delete_debug_port

Description: 
Delete debug port

Syntax: 
delete_debug_port  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ports>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ports>     Debug ports to delete

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
